data.title: Zoho Corporation - Wikipedia
data.content:
## Products

Zoho has over 45 integrated applications, mainly designed for small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs), but scalable for larger enterprises. These products span many categories, including customer relationship management, marketing, sales, customer support, finance, human resources, collaboration, productivity, operations, IT management, and analytics. Notable products include the online office suite offering Zoho Office Suite, customer relationship management software Zoho CRM "Zoho CRM (application)"), accounting software Zoho Books, HR management platform Zoho People, and project management software Zoho Projects. [...] Increase
Decrease

Zoho Corporation is an Indian multinational technology company that makes cloud-based business software. Its core products include workplace productivity and collaboration software, customer relationship management (CRM) software, and business management tools. The company was founded in 1996 by Sridhar Vembu and Tony Thomas as AdventNet, Inc., in New Jersey. Zoho is headquartered in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India, and has offices in 80 countries, with its US headquarters located in Austin, Texas.

As of 2023, it is privately owned, with co-founders Tony Thomas and Sridhar Vembu holding 8% and 5% stakes, and Sridhar Vembu's sister Radha Vembu and brother Sekar Vembu owning 47.8% and 35.2% of the company, respectively.

## History [...] ManageEngine has both on-premises and cloud-based software products in categories such as enterprise IT management, cybersecurity, and unified endpoint management.

### Messaging app

Arattai is an instant messaging application developed by Zoho and launched in January 2021. It experienced a brief surge in new user sign-ups in 2025 when Zoho products were promoted by Indian government officials as part of their push for homegrown alternatives to foreign‐owned apps.

### Browser

Ulaa Browser is a web browser developed by Zoho, based on the Chromium "Chromium (web browser)") open-source project and released in 2023. Ulaa routes its Domain Name System (DNS) queries through India's national root server system, rather than using default global DNS providers.

### Email

data.title: Companies Using Zoho CRM in 2026 - TechnologyChecker.io
data.content:
What is the ideal customer profile for Zoho CRM?

The ideal Zoho CRM customer is: Company Size: 1-10 employees, Location: India, US, or Canada, City: Mumbai, Bangalore, Chennai, New York, Founded: 2010-2019, Company Age: ~5-15 years old — based on our analysis of 3,927 enriched companies at TechnologyChecker.io.

Which big companies use Zoho CRM?

KPMG, Atos, the Los Angeles Times, and JSW all appear in our detection data with Zoho CRM components on their websites. Zoho's own published customer stories list Brigade Group, Agoda, and Mistras Group as verified users. That said, Zoho CRM's customer base skews heavily toward small businesses -- 47.9% of detected deployments come from companies with 1-10 employees.

Does Netflix use Zoho? [...] How many companies have stopped using Zoho CRM?

Our data shows 5,099 domains previously used Zoho CRM but no longer have it detected. That churn number needs context: some domains shut down entirely, others moved Zoho CRM behind authentication where we can't detect it, and some genuinely switched platforms. Current active deployments sit at 4,456, meaning cumulative churn slightly exceeds the current active base.

About Our Data [...] Which countries use Zoho CRM the most?

India leads with 1,520 Zoho CRM customers, followed by United States (1,054), Canada (147), Australia (111), United Kingdom (105), based on our enriched company data at TechnologyChecker.io.

What size companies use Zoho CRM?

The most common company size is 1-10 employees, representing 47.9% of Zoho CRM customers, based on our analysis of 3,927 enriched companies. This is followed by 11-50 employees (28.6%) and 51-200 employees (15.8%).

How old are companies that use Zoho CRM?

The majority of Zoho CRM customers were founded in the 2010s (44.35%), followed by the 2020s (20.99%), based on our analysis of 3,927 enriched companies. This suggests Zoho CRM is most popular among relatively young companies.

### Commerce

Diseña una tienda online, fortalece tus operaciones de ecommerce y venta minorista para vender mejor.

### Asistencia al cliente

Potencia tus equipos de servicio al cliente y de campo para que brinden satisfacción y obtengan confianza.

### Finanzas

Mantente informado sobre tus gastos y gestiona tus operaciones administrativas sin problemas.

### Correo electrónico y colaboración

Crea, colabora y comunícate con tus equipos y clientes.

### RR. HH.

Contrata a nuevos empleados, realiza sesiones de formación y gestiona todas las operaciones de RR. HH. con facilidad.

### Asuntos legales

Optimiza los procesos de los contratos, mitiga los riesgos y mejora la eficiencia de tus operaciones legales.

### Gestión de seguridad y TI [...] ### Gestión de seguridad y TI

Gestiona los activos de TI mediante herramientas listas o crea una aplicación personalizada que se adapte a tus necesidades.

### Inteligencia empresarial y análisis

Haz que los datos cobren vida con imágenes atractivas y paneles detallados.

### Gestión de proyectos

Elige el estilo de gestión de proyectos que se adapte mejor a tu empresa.

### Plataformas para desarrolladores

Automatiza los procesos empresariales, gestiona flujos de trabajo personalizados y diseña aplicaciones. Para ello, puedes elegir entre herramientas sin código, poco código y código profesional.

### IoT

Conecta datos, dispositivos y decisiones con integraciones y automatizaciones sin problemas de IoT.
